rulings.Case Title: JO ANN FARESE VS. CHASE HOME FINANCE LLC, et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday Oct. 03, 2012. Line 1 - DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A., AS SUCCESSOR BY MERGER, CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Off calendar, moving party failed to comply with court order September 5, 2012 to provide complete copy of operative pleading. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSHUA CONDIE et al VS. CONOR NUGENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Reclassify Case To Limited Jurisdiction
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday Oct. 03, 2012. Line 2 - DEFENDANT CONOR NUGENT and 1233 POLK STREET LLC's Motion To Reclassify Case To Limited Jurisdiction. Deny - moving party failed to show that (1) plaintiff's damages could not possibly be $25,000 or greater. (2) Injunctive relief is unlimited jurisdiction matter. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CONSTANCE BOURGES VS. DANY SCHER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday Oct. 03, 2012. Line 3 - DEFENDANT DANNY SCHER's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Continue to October 11, 2012. Moving party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C, opposing party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. =(501/ERQ)

rulings.Case Title: CONSTANCE BOURGES VS. DANY SCHER et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday Oct. 03, 2012. Line 3 - DEFENDANT DANNY SCHER's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Continue to October 11, 2012. Moving party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C, opposing party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. =(501/EQ)

rulings.Case Title: SF VALENCIA PROPERTIES LLC VS. MARITSA DIMEGLIO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday Oct. 03, 2012. Line 7 - PLAINTIFF SF VALENCIA PROPERTIES LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny motion for summary judgment triable issue re waiver. See deposition of Massarweh page 109 line 22-25, page 112 line 7-20, page 116 line 11-25, page 117 line 1-8. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. DARROW BOGGIANO
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday Oct. 03, 2012. Line 5 - DEFENDANT DARROW BOGGIANO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Grant subject to opposition on failure to state fact re paragraph 18C of the lease exhibit to complaint. =(501/REQ)
